def positive_anonymous_dict_shape_repeated_without_shared_type_or_builder():
    rule_id = "anonymous_dict_shape_repeated_without_shared_type_or_builder"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated ad hoc dict payload shapes with no shared type or builder."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
